title: Null casting causes no results (silent server crash?)
poc: CREATE TABLE "unitTestDontDelete" ("A" INT, "B" VARCHAR(255), "C" DOUBLE, "D" TIMESTAMP);

select * from "test_join_left_table" as "ta" where not exists (select 1 as "one" from (select "t2"."A", "t2"."B", "t2"."C", "t2"."D", "t2"."l_c" from ((select "t0"."A" as "A", cast("B" as  CLOB) as "B", "t0"."C" as "C", "t0"."D" as "D", null as "l_c" from "unitTestDontDelete" as "t0") union all (select "t1"."a" as "A", "t1"."b" as "B", cast(null as double) as "C", cast(null as timestamp) as "D", "t1"."l_c" as "l_c" from "test_join_left_table" as "t1")) as "t2") as "tb" where ("ta"."l_c" = "tb"."l_c" or ("ta"."l_c" is null and "tb"."l_c" is null)));
key_bug_features: Null casting in SQL query causes silent failures
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "unitTestNullCasting" ("id" INT PRIMARY KEY, "value" VARCHAR(100), "amount" DOUBLE, "created_at" TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO "unitTestNullCasting" VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5, NOW()), (2, 'test2', NULL, NOW());
CREATE TABLE "test_null_handling" ("x" INT, "y" VARCHAR(50), "z" DOUBLE, "w" TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO "test_null_handling" VALUES (1, 'example', 5.0, NULL), (2, NULL, 3.5, NOW());
SELECT * FROM "test_null_handling" WHERE "y" IS NULL OR ("z" = CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AND "w" IS NULL);
